mapper.sql: menu.menu_key, menu.up_menu_key, menu.menu_level, menu.menu_title, menu.menu_url, menu.sort_index, menu.description, menu.use_yn, menu.menu_type, menu.reg_date, menu.mod_date, menu.reg_user_key, menu.mod_user_key
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM common_menu menu WHERE 1=1
AND menu.use_yn = #{useYn}
AND menu.menu_title LIKE '%' || #{menuTitle} || '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_menu (menu_key, up_menu_key, menu_level, menu_title, menu_url, sort_index, description, use_yn, menu_type, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{menuKey}, #{upMenuKey}, #{menuLevel}, #{menuTitle}, #{menuUrl}, #{sortIndex}, #{description}, #{useYn}, #{menuType}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{modUserKey})
mapper.update: UPDATE common_menu SET up_menu_key = #{upMenuKey}, menu_level = #{menuLevel}, menu_title = #{menuTitle}, menu_url = #{menuUrl}, sort_index = #{sortIndex}, description = #{description}, use_yn = #{useYn}, menu_type = #{menuType}, mod_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, mod_user_key = #{modUserKey} WHERE menu_key = #{menuKey}
